headline: Novo Nordisk says Wegovy pill outperforms Lilly’s oral GLP-1 in cross-trial comparison
summary: Novo and Eli Lilly are both trying to shape the narrative of their rival pills, considered to be the start of the next phase of the weight-loss drug era.

headline: CVS adds a radical new store concept
summary: CVS is making a comeback with a new store concept. The company is repositioning itself as a health brand. Instead of being the store to quickly stop by for your favorite snacks and pick up some painkillers for your headache while you are there, the company wants to go back to its core business: ...
